hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-headings uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl font-headings uppercase tracking-tight
hierarchy.labels: text-xs font-body font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-400

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF007F] hover:bg-[#E0006F] text-white font-headings uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 hover:border-[#FF007F] text-white font-headings uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-[#FF007F]/10

cards.style: bg-[#121212] border border-zinc-800 rounded-none overflow-hidden relative group

surface_strategies.headers: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10
surface_strategies.data_widgets: Grid Borders: border-collapse style with border-r border-b border-border/40 for match stats and schedule
surface_strategies.ai_chat: Retro-Futurism mix: Deep black bg, subtle pink scanlines, glowing pink cursor

motion_interactions.hover_states: High contrast shifts. Explicit hover:text-white. Sharp, snappy transitions.
motion_interactions.marquee: React-fast-marquee for 'EKIPA Z JEEPA' repeating text in background (massive outline text text-8xl+ text-white/5)
motion_interactions.reveal: Framer motion staggered fade-up for news and players (duration 0.4s, easeOut)

images.description: Blurry lights streak across a dark stadium field
images.usage: Hero section background with dark overlay (bg-black/50)
Background layer for squad or news sections to add grittiness

images.description: Football player running on field during heavy rain
images.usage: News article thumbnail or gallery image

images.description: Intense soccer match under night lights
images.usage: Schedule/Results section background or highlight image

images.description: An athlete in a red/pink uniform running with a football

logo.instruction:
User will provide the pink logo. Use an empty div or a temporary text-based logo matching the font for now. e.g.
EKIPA Z JEEPA

instructions_to_main_agent: Use JS exclusively. NO TypeScript files.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Only use Anton or a bold Google Font equivalent (e.g., '@fontsource/anton' or import from Google Fonts) for headings.
Implement the UI with a very dark background (almost black) and vivid electric pink (#FF007F) as the sole accent color. Avoid purple gradients entirely.
Admin Panel: Create a simple dashboard to manage CRUD for News, Matches, and Squad. Use the 'Control Room' grid layout from E1 guidelines. High density, clear data.
AI Match Summaries: Display match results with a distinct 'AI Generated' tag. Use Shadcn components heavily customized to be dark and angular.
Fan Chatbot Assistant: Must be a floating interactive element or a dedicated route, styled with retro-futuristic dark mode elements.
Every page must have a sticky navigation with crystal glassmorphism.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Apply Lenis for smooth scrolling in the main Layout.
Incorporate a react-fast-marquee with massive typography in the background of the Schedule or Squad section.
Never use raw transparent backgrounds behind text if an image is present. Use bg-black/60 or gradient overlays.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Dialogs, Tabs, Admin Tables), but strip their default borders/radii to match the brutal, sharp, rounded-none sports aesthetic.
